What We Do

Our Services

Professional Driveway & Block Paving Specialists services delivered to the highest standard across Coventry, Kenilworth & Warwickshire.

Block Paving

Classic and contemporary block paving in a range of colours and patterns. Fully edged, compacted sub-base, guaranteed not to sink.

Resin Bound Driveways

SuDS-compliant resin driveways in natural gravel finishes. Smooth, weed-resistant, and planning-permission friendly.

Tarmac Driveways

Durable tarmac surfacing for driveways and car parks. Fast installation, long-lasting results, great for large areas.

Patio & Paving

Natural stone, porcelain, and concrete paving for patios, paths, and garden areas — laid to last.

Dropped Kerbs

Council-approved dropped kerb applications and installations. We handle the paperwork and the groundwork.

Driveway Repairs

Sunken areas, cracked blocks, drainage issues — we diagnose the cause and fix it properly, not just patch it.

Why Choose Us

The Midlands Difference

Free, No-Obligation Quotes

We visit your property, assess the job and give you a clear written quote — no pressure, no hidden costs.

Fully Insured & Guaranteed

All work is covered by public liability insurance and backed by our workmanship guarantee.

14 Years Local Experience

Trusted by homeowners across Coventry, Kenilworth & Warwickshire for over 14 years. Our reputation is everything.

No Subcontractors

Your job is done by our own skilled team, not passed off to third parties. Same quality every time.

Clear, Honest Pricing

The price we quote is the price you pay. We explain every cost upfront before any work begins.

Responsive & Easy to Reach

We answer calls and messages quickly. You'll always know where you stand on your project.

What Customers Say

Real Reviews

Don't just take our word for it.

"Couldn't be happier with our new block paved driveway. The team were tidy, professional, and finished a day ahead of schedule. Already had three neighbours ask for their number."
Steve Barlow
Kenilworth
★★★★★
"We had a resin driveway fitted and it looks absolutely stunning. The quote was honest and the price didn't change. Would 100% recommend Midlands Block Paving."
Diane Hussain
Coventry
★★★★★
"Had a tarmac driveway and a new patio done at the same time. Brilliant job on both. The lads were respectful of the garden and left everything clean. Top quality work."
Paul & Janet Whitmore
Leamington Spa
★★★★★
"Got three quotes and Midlands Block Paving were the most transparent. No hidden extras. The finished driveway is exactly what we asked for — really pleased."
Raj Patel
Solihull
About Us

About Midlands Block Paving

Midlands Block Paving has been laying driveways across Coventry and Warwickshire since 2010. We're a family-run business — no subcontractors, no salespeople, just a skilled team who take pride in every job. We specialise in block paving, resin bound, and tarmac driveways for homeowners who want it done properly the first time. Every project starts with a free, no-obligation visit where we measure up, talk through your options honestly, and give you a fixed written quote — no surprises on the invoice.

Get a Free Quote
14+
Years in business
300+ Happy Customers
Happy customers
5★
Average rating
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Most standard driveways take 2–4 days depending on size and access. We'll give you a specific timeframe when we visit for your free quote.
Generally no — driveways under 5m² or made from permeable materials (like resin bound) don't need permission. We'll advise you at the quoting stage and handle any applications if needed.
Yes, resin bound can be laid on slopes up to around 1:10 gradient. Steeper slopes may need a different surface — we'll assess yours when we visit.
Resin bound mixes the aggregate into the resin before laying — it's SuDS compliant and smooth. Resin bonded sticks loose stone to a surface — it can shed stones over time. We use resin bound as standard.
With a proper sub-base and good drainage, a tarmac driveway should last 20–25 years. We use commercial-grade tarmac, not domestic patch mix.
Yes — all our driveways come with a 5-year workmanship guarantee. If anything related to our installation fails within that period, we'll put it right at no cost to you.
